Connect to a remote opendbx server (use opendbx:// URLs)

Usage:
  opendbx open <opendbx-url> [flags]

Flags:
  -h, --help   help for open

Global Flags:
  -d, --debug string        Enable debug mode with optional category filtering (e.g., "api,hooks" or "!1p,!file")
      --debug-file string   Write debug logs to a specific file path (implicitly enables debug mode)
      --verbose             Override verbose mode setting from config
